name: gouging-fire
flavor_texts: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.
text: Gouging-fire is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a fire and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 105, Attack: 115, Defense: 121, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 93, Speed: 91. Evolution line: gouging-fire. Lore: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame. It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.
